where_to_eat.name: Local Cheese & Wine Shops
where_to_eat.description: Paris is known for amazing cheese and wine selections. Visitors highly recommend exploring local shops to experience authentic French culinary traditions.

into_the_wild.name: Jardin du Luxembourg
into_the_wild.description: A beautiful historic garden in Paris where visitors can spot wildlife like the mandarin duck and enjoy peaceful outdoor spaces in the city.

into_the_wild.name: Jardin des Tuileries
into_the_wild.description: A major Parisian garden and outdoor attraction that offers scenic walks and a serene escape within the city center.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Parisian Doors (Art Nouveau Architecture)
gram_worthy_spots.description: The ornate doors throughout Paris showcase beautiful Art Nouveau designs and historic architectural details perfect for photography and exploration.

gram_worthy_spots.name: La Voie Royale
gram_worthy_spots.description: A historic thoroughfare in Paris that serves as a visual timeline of the city's architecture and monuments, from royal heritage to Napoleonic era landmarks.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Night Time Walks Along the Streets
gram_worthy_spots.description: Paris is magical during evening walks, especially along medieval and historic streets that become beautifully atmospheric after dark.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Plateau de Saclay Area
off_the_beaten_path.description: A transformed area visible from the Grand Paris Express viaduct, showcasing modern urban development projects and infrastructure with stunning views.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Vegetal Streets (Green Infrastructure Project)
off_the_beaten_path.description: Several neighborhoods feature newly vegetalized streets that have been beautifully transformed with greenery and plants, creating pleasant and agreeably redesigned urban spaces.
